nodes.title: Marketing Fundamentals for Business Promotion
nodes.rationale: To effectively promote your business, it's essential to first grasp the core principles of marketing, including understanding market dynamics and how businesses interact with customers.

nodes.title: Defining Business Goals & Target Audience
nodes.rationale: Before creating any promotional content, especially videos, you must clearly define what you want to achieve and precisely who you want to reach. This ensures your efforts are focused and effective.
suggested_micro_topics: Identifying Customer Needs and Pain Points

nodes.title: Content Strategy with a Video Focus
nodes.rationale: Given your preference for videos, this module focuses on planning a content strategy that leverages video to engage your target audience and achieve your business promotion goals.
suggested_micro_topics: Brainstorming Video Content Ideas (e.g., tutorials, behind-the-scenes, testimonials)
Content Pillars and Themes for Your Business

nodes.title: Basic Video Production and Editing Skills
nodes.rationale: To create engaging videos for your business, you need fundamental skills in shooting and editing. This module will equip you with the practical knowledge to produce your own promotional video content.
suggested_micro_topics: Introduction to Simple Editing Software (e.g., CapCut, InShot, DaVinci Resolve Free)
Scripting and Storyboarding for Short Videos

nodes.title: Social Media Marketing for Business Promotion
nodes.rationale: Social media platforms are crucial for distributing your video content and connecting with potential customers. This module covers the basics of using social media to promote your business effectively.
suggested_micro_topics: Choosing the Right Social Media Platforms (e.g., Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, YouTube)
Crafting Engaging Captions for Video Posts
Basic Engagement Strategies and Community Building

nodes.title: Video SEO and Maximizing Discoverability
nodes.rationale: Even great videos won't promote your business if no one can find them. This module teaches you how to optimize your videos for search engines and platforms to increase their visibility and reach.
suggested_micro_topics: Transcripts and Closed Captions for Accessibility and SEO

nodes.title: Introduction to Paid Video Advertising
nodes.rationale: To quickly expand your reach and target specific audiences, understanding paid advertising for videos is essential. This module introduces you to the basics of running video ad campaigns.
suggested_micro_topics: Overview of Major Ad Platforms (e.g., Facebook Ads, YouTube Ads)
Setting Ad Objectives (e.g., Brand Awareness, Leads)

nodes.title: Measuring and Analyzing Marketing Performance
nodes.rationale: To ensure your video promotion efforts are successful and continuously improve, you need to track their performance. This module covers how to measure results and make data-driven decisions.
suggested_micro_topics: Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) for Video Marketing
Introduction to Analytics Tools (e.g., YouTube Analytics, Facebook Insights)

raw_output:
```json
{
  "nodes": [
    {
      "node_id": "Marketing_Fundamentals",
      "title": "Marketing Fundamentals for Business Promotion",
      "rationale": "To effectively promote your business, it's essential to first grasp the core principles of marketing, including understanding market dynamics and how businesses interact with customers.",
      "prerequisites": [],
      "suggested_micro_topics": [
        "What is Marketing?",
        "The Marketing Mix (4 Ps)",
        "Understanding Market Segments",
        "Introduction to Value Proposition",
        "Marketing Ethics and Regulations"
      ]
    },
    {
      "node_id": "Define_Your_Business_Goals_and_Audience",
      "title": "Defining Business Goals & Target Audience",
      "rationale": "Before creating any promotional content, especially videos, you must clearly define what you want to achieve and precisely who you want to reach. This ensures your efforts are focused and effective.",
      "prerequisites": [
        "Marketing_Fundamentals"
      ],
      "suggested_micro_topics": [
        "Setting SMART Business Goals",
        "Developing Buyer Personas",
        "Market Research Basics",
        "Identifying Customer Needs and Pain Points",
        "Competitor Analysis for Small Businesses"
      ]
    },
    {
      "node_id": "Content_Strategy_for_Video_Promotion",
      "title": "Content Strategy with a Video Focus",
      "rationale": "Given your preference for videos, this module focuses on planning a content strategy that leverages video to engage your target audience and achieve your business promotion goals.",
      "prerequisites": [
        "Define_Your_Business_Goals_and_Audience"
      ],
      "suggested_micro_topics": [
        "Brainstorming Video Content Ideas (e.g., tutorials, behind-the-scenes, testimonials)",
        "Developing a Content Calendar",
        "Storytelling Principles for Video",
        "Call to Action (CTA) in Videos",
        "Content Pillars and Themes for Your Business"
      ]
    },
    {
      "node_id": "Basic_Video_Production_and_Editing",
      "title": "Basic Video Production and Editing Skills",
      "rationale": "To create engaging videos for your business, you need fundamental skills in shooting and editing. This module will equip you with the practical knowledge to produce your own promotional video content.",
      "prerequisites": [
        "Content_Strategy_for_Video_Promotion"
      ],
      "suggested_micro_topics": [
        "Smartphone Videography Techniques",
        "Basic Lighting and Audio Setup",
        "Introduction to Simple Editing Software (e.g., CapCut, InShot, DaVinci Resolve Free)",
        "Scripting and Storyboarding for Short Videos",
        "Adding Text, Music, and Graphics"
      ]
    },
    {
      "node_id": "Social_Media_Marketing_for_Beginners",
      "title": "Social Media Marketing for Business Promotion",
      "rationale": "Social media platforms are crucial for distributing your video content and connecting with potential customers. This module covers the basics of using social media to promote your business effectively.",
      "prerequisites": [
        "Content_Strategy_for_Video_Promotion"
      ],
      "suggested_micro_topics": [
        "Choosing the Right Social Media Platforms (e.g., Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, YouTube)",
        "Optimizing Social Media Profiles",
        "Crafting Engaging Captions for Video Posts",
        "Understanding Hashtags and Trends",
        "Basic Engagement Strategies and Community Building"
      ]
    },
    {
      "node_id": "Video_SEO_and_Discovery",
      "title": "Video SEO and Maximizing Discoverability",
      "rationale": "Even great videos won't promote your business if no one can find them. This module teaches you how to optimize your videos for search engines and platforms to increase their visibility and reach.",
      "prerequisites": [
        "Basic_Video_Production_and_Editing",
        "Social_Media_Marketing_for_Beginners"
      ],
      "suggested_micro_topics": [
        "Keyword Research for Video Content",
        "Optimizing Video Titles and Descriptions",
        "Creating Engaging Thumbnails",
        "Utilizing Tags and Categories",
        "Understanding YouTube SEO Best Practices",
        "Transcripts and Closed Captions for Accessibility and SEO"
      ]
    },
    {
      "node_id": "Intro_to_Paid_Video_Advertising",
      "title": "Introduction to Paid Video Advertising",
      "rationale": "To quickly expand your reach and target specific audiences, understanding paid advertising for videos is essential. This module introduces you to the basics of running video ad campaigns.",
      "prerequisites": [
        "Social_Media_Marketing_for_Beginners"
      ],
      "suggested_micro_topics": [
        "Overview of Major Ad Platforms (e.g., Facebook Ads, YouTube Ads)",
        "Setting Ad Objectives (e.g., Brand Awareness, Leads)",
        "Basic Audience Targeting",
        "Understanding Ad Budgets and Bidding",
        "Creating Simple Video Ad Creatives"
      ]
    },
    {
      "node_id": "Measuring_Marketing_Success",
      "title": "Measuring and Analyzing Marketing Performance",
      "rationale": "To ensure your video promotion efforts are successful and continuously improve, you need to track their performance. This module covers how to measure results and make data-driven decisions.",
      "prerequisites": [
        "Video_SEO_and_Discovery",
        "Intro_to_Paid_Video_Advertising"
      ],
      "suggested_micro_topics": [
        "Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) for Video Marketing",
        "Introduction to Analytics Tools (e.g., YouTube Analytics, Facebook Insights)",
        "Understanding Video Engagement Metrics",
        "Basic Conversion Tracking",
        "Interpreting Data for Optimization"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```
